name: Kenorland Minerals Ltd.
description: Kenorland Minerals Ltd. (TSX.V: KLD) is a well-financed mineral exploration company focused on project generation and early-stage exploration in North America. The company’s exploration strategy involves advancing greenfields projects through systematic, property-wide, phased exploration surveys, often financed via exploration partnerships and joint venture agreements. Kenorland holds a 4% net smelter return royalty on the Frotet Project in Quebec, which hosts the significant Regnault gold system discovery. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company is dedicated to leading the next generation of mineral discoveries through its extensive portfolio of gold and base metal projects.
